positive: A vibrant, minimalist, retro-futuristic botanical illustration featuring highly stylized blooming celestial flora—imagine a cluster of glowing, geometric flowers interwoven with delicate, sweeping vines. The style should be a blend of Art Deco symmetry and vaporwave aesthetics, rendered with crisp, bold outlines and saturated, high-contrast colors (electric blues, magenta, neon yellow, and teal). The composition must be highly centralized and contained within a decorative border, suitable for placement on t-shirts. Focus on clean, solid shapes and clear negative space. Flat color blocking with subtle gradient overlays for dimension. Vector art quality, high detail, perfect symmetry, silkscreen print aesthetic.
negative: blurry, artifacts, messy, grainy, noise, watermark, logo, text, signature, faded, low contrast, bad anatomy, deformed, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts, out of frame, unnecessary background elements
